title: NhatJS's Enhanced Furniture Mod
description: Add reimplemented and new enhanced furnitures and cool electronic to your new Minecraft from old Furniture Mod!
body:
**NOTE:** This mod will be always _alpha/beta_ because even it released, this mod was still development in order to complete several unfinished stuffs. Until the mod is 100% complete, it will be switched from _alpha/beta_ to _release_.

Welcome to NhatJS's Enhanced Furniture Mod. This is basically the enhanced version of NhatJS's Furniture Mod, for some reason: 
- In newest 26.1, cutout and transculent systems are now automatically used depending on how textures work, but when it comes this, there are annoying glitch/invisible issues when put on several furnitures, especially some realistic furnitures aren't working.
- Because the newest Minecraft version starts opening new era with new version numbering system.

Those are reasons why I decided to create new **Enhanced** mod to fix that textures applied issues by remaking several furnitures to make low-poly blocky but realism a bit better, but also create new furnitures never before seen in my mod. However, there are some furnitures from old mod that I decided to keep, and several other stuffs that I (kinda) have to remove for unnecessary reasons.

As always, you can use many objects or items to build your own decorations based on your imaginations. Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/nf7XR6vG4y) server if there is any issues, and also share any ideas if you will! (but don't make it difficult... I'm sorry)

Screenshots: in "Gallery" tab
